summary: SRE QA Audit (Iteration 85) - All SRE endpoints working correctly. Circuit Breakers, Auto-Scaling, Self-Healing, and CDN Status endpoints all return expected data with proper admin authentication. Frontend dashboards and feature pages load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 circuit breakers (gemini, openai, sora, elevenlabs, storage, payment) properly initialized and returning status
Auto-scaling service correctly tracks queue depth, processing jobs, and worker count
Self-healing endpoints properly detect stuck jobs and unreconciled payments
CDN status endpoint returns asset status with cache configurations
Public /api/sre/health endpoint accessible without auth - correct for monitoring
All admin SRE endpoints properly protected with get_admin_user dependency

success_rate.backend: 93% (13/14 tests passed - 1 minor test used wrong profile endpoint)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SRE endpoints all functional. Routes: /api/sre/health (public), /api/sre/circuits, /api/sre/scaling, /api/sre/healing/status, /api/sre/cdn/status (all admin-only). User profile is at /api/auth/me not /api/user/profile.

SRE_Health_Endpoint.response: Returns overall health status with database, jobs, and dead_letter_queue checks

Circuit_Breakers_Endpoint.response: Returns state, failure_count, can_execute for each circuit

Auto_Scaling_Endpoint.response: Returns current_workers, min/max_workers, queue_depth, processing count, scaling recommendation

Self_Healing_Endpoint.response: Returns issues_detected with stuck_jobs and unreconciled_payments counts

CDN_Status_Endpoint.response: Returns asset_status with expired_links, missing_assets, and cache_config

auth_protection_verified.sre_health: Public - No auth required (correct for external monitoring)
auth_protection_verified.demo_user_sre_access: Demo user correctly blocked from SRE admin endpoints (403)
